creator: David.Boyd49@twc.com
text:
dialog(1) prints ugly black bars in programbox output

This PR is similar/identical to PR 242613 which fixed cdialog from ports.

This problem appeared in the earliest versions of 13.0-CURRENT and is still present in 13.0-BETA3 and also in 14.0-CURRENT.

The problems appears to have entered the base system when dialog-1.3-20180621 was acquired.

According to PR 242613, the problem was fixed by dialog-1.3-20200327.

The current version of dialog appears to be dialog-1.3-20201126.

The problem can easily be reproduced by:

                cat /etc/rc,conf | dialog --programbox 23 76

Thanks, in advance, for any help with the resolution of this problem that you can provide.

David Boyd.
